title: Agent Learning
description: Cross-run behavioural learning — patterns detected by Run Analyst, standing instructions injected at runtime

detection_source.description: Which artefacts and tickets the pattern was detected from

standing_instruction.description: Instruction injected into the agent's context on future runs

occurrences.description: Number of runs where pattern was observed

runs_since_instruction.description: Runs completed since instruction was added

recurrences_after_instruction.description: Times pattern recurred after instruction was active (2+ triggers persistent escalation)

runs_with_instruction.description: Total runs where this instruction was active (for effectiveness scoring)

effectiveness_score.description: Ratio of clean runs to total runs with instruction (1.0 = perfect, 0 = always recurs)

status.description: active=instruction injected, resolved=5 clean runs, persistent=2+ recurrences, ineffective=pruned (score<0.5 after 10+ runs)
